run_summary.summary: One update: Flexsteel/Steinhafels thread advanced this afternoon. Ian (Popfly) asked Kenny to submit a support ticket for the business account access issue and confirm their store visit time. Kenny confirmed both — ticket being submitted today, arriving at Steinhafels Downers Grove 11:30-12pm Thursday (Apr 23). Everything else (Linkind concept approval, other brands) quiet since last run.

suggestions.message: Store visit is Thursday (Apr 23) at 11:30am-12pm at the Steinhafels Downers Grove location. Also make sure the Popfly support ticket actually got submitted today — Kenny said he'd do it this afternoon.
Still waiting on concept approval (Liz responded Apr 20). If you haven't heard back by tomorrow (Apr 22), worth nudging the socialmediacollabs.com agency so Liz can get to filming.

deals.next_action: Attend Steinhafels retail store visit (arrive 11:30-12pm) + check Popfly support ticket status
deals.notes: [Apr 21 PM]: Ian (Popfly) asked Kenny to submit a support ticket for the business account access issue — click the green chat bubble in the platform. Kenny confirmed ticket being submitted today. Also confirmed store visit: arriving Steinhafels Downers Grove 11:30-12pm Thursday (Apr 23).
deals.activity_note: Apr 21: Kenny confirmed Popfly support ticket being submitted + Steinhafels store visit set for Thu Apr 23 at 11:30am-12pm
